name: D+Q postmenopausal women bone-metabolism randomized trial
summary: Phase 2 randomized controlled trial testing intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin effects on bone-resorption and bone-formation biomarkers in postmenopausal women.
population: Sixty postmenopausal women randomized to intermittent D+Q or control.

trial_details.horizon_note: Result-bearing human randomized biomarker trial with a null primary endpoint and exploratory subgroup signals.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is a stronger controlled human senolytic dataset than small pilots, but its primary endpoint is negative.
